content:
<:sleep2:1356085993626665200> my little tribute to Tulu, honestly born from nothing more than my wish to see him happy, even if its fleetingly small <:wish:1356084702468899117>  I also just wanted to explore his character in my own way, and i hope that you enjoy this if you decide to check it out! <:satisfy:1400771690321154110> <:love:1356053099931897977> 

Synopsis: Tulu had measured eternity by the rise and fall of an empty festival, its lanterns burning only for him—the lone curator, the unwilling captive. The festival is also a perfect, heartless mirror. But a mirror can only reflect what is placed before it. 
And so when something new steps into the frame—something bright, fleeting, and utterly real—the cold reflection shatters. Now, what happens to the dreamer when the dream learns how to change?

List of Content: 
01: The Museum of a Lost Self.
02: Nth Wakenings in a Single Bone.
03: A Shape Without a Silhouette.
04: A Blue Stone for the Drowning.
05: The Carousel’s New Throat.
06: The Crystallization of Joy.
07: Metamorphosis in Morning Light.

https://docs.google.com/document/d/132DgQk8CCID8C3Earhb1Z-jfYBs-PDX9cVLJ1B28kn0/edit?usp=sharing

Thank you for reading and have a nice day! <:Sendflowers:1400771545370067118>
